FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF THE PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT. TERMS READ INTO THE RECORD BY PLTFS. COUNSEL. PLTF. PREPARED JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARYL, JOY-SUSAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 919 SUTTER STREET, APT #27, SF, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAY-23-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH FOR DETAILS.
